all.critique:
Overall, the analysis is very thorough and covers the main responsibilities (file reading, key validation, error handling, exposing configuration to downstream modules, etc.) that a Config class should have. However, I noticed a few issues:

1. Type Conversion and Casting Details (Medium Severity)  
 • The analysis mentions that values should be “converted and type-cast properly” (e.g., batch sizes to integers, learning rates to floats), but it doesn’t detail how errors during conversion will be
